name: tr-dependency-analyser
description: Root metadata only. The TR Dependency Analyser has no Node.js code today — the Eclipse plugin builds via Maven Tycho (eclipse/pom.xml) and the ABAP backend installs via abapGit. This file exists so JS-based tooling (markdown linters, link checkers, etc.) has somewhere to be configured if added later.

scripts.comment: No-op placeholders. Replace with real scripts when JS tooling is added.
